ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code (e.g., LD, LA) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "density" REAL /* Population density of the state per square kilometer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health test entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the tests were conducted */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted in the state */,
  "testing_ratio" REAL /* Testing ratio (tests per 1,000 population) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., COVID-19, malaria) */,
  "test_results" TEXT /* Results of the test (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_tests_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health test entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the health test entry */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the health test entry was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES health_tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_initiatives" (
  "initiative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health initiative */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the initiative is implemented */,
  "initiative_name" TEXT /* Name of the health initiative */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the initiative */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the initiative */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the initiative */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the initiative */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the initiative (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("initiative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_initiatives_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health office */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the health office is located */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the health office */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the health office */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the health office */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the health office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_offices_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_workers" (
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health worker */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the health worker is based */,
  "worker_name" TEXT /* Full name of the health worker */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the health worker */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the health worker (e.g., doctor, nurse, administrator) */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health office where the worker is based */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the health worker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("worker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_workers_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES health_offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_workers_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health report */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the report was generated */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the health report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the health report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the health report in MB */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_reports_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health equipment */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the equipment is located */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the health equipment */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the equipment */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was acquired */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the equipment (e.g., good, fair, poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_equipment_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health service */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the service is provided */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the health service */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the health service */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the health service (e.g., 24/7, weekdays only) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the health service */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., emergency, non-emergency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_services_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_partners" (
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health partner */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the partner is located */,
  "partner_name" TEXT /* Name of the health partner */,
  "partner_type" TEXT /* Type of partner (e.g., NGO, private organization) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the health partner */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the health partner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_partners_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_insurance" (
  "insurance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health insurance scheme */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the scheme is implemented */,
  "insurance_name" TEXT /* Name of the health insurance scheme */,
  "insurance_type" TEXT /* Type of insurance (e.g., individual, family) */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits provided by the insurance scheme */,
  "premium" REAL /* Premium amount for the insurance scheme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_insurance_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health alert */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the alert was issued */,
  "alert_name" TEXT /* Name of the health alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was issued */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the health alert */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_alerts_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health resource */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the resource is located */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the health resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., hospital, clinic, pharmacy) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the resource (e.g., good, fair, poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_resources_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_research" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health research study */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the study was conducted */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the health research study */,
  "study_date" TEXT /* Date when the study was conducted */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Description of the health research study */,
  "study_results" TEXT /* Results of the health research study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_research_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)
